body:value:
This file provides data on the consumption of electricity (in lakh units) of Bengaluru City.\
The data is provided by BESCOM Bengaluru Electricity Supply Company Limited.\
The data breakup public,commercial,domestic,industry,public water work and street light,others and the total consumption is available.

Karnataka
State

Smart Cities Mission
Karnataka
Bengaluru

Non Renewable
Power
Power and Energy
keywords: public water work and street light
title: Electricity Consumption of Bengaluru City
